violations.text: The ceiling tiles in the kitchen space are constructed of acoustic composite tile which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025

Fudge bites, brownies, muffins, and cocoa bombs packaged in the food establishment are lacking all required information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen space are constructed of acoustic composite tile which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025
Feline medication observed in refrigerator stored with food. PIC informed to cease practice. Medications removed from refrigerator during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024

Fudge and brownies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024

Crossover of food establishment equipment and feline supplies observed stored together in mop room. Adequate separation of supplies required to prevent sources of contamination. PIC informed adequate separation of supplies required. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
Plexiglass partition near 3 bay sink is not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving of equipment. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
The coving under the 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen space are constructed of acoustic composite tile which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on the two door low boy were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024

The floor in the bathroom is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Corrective action - Establishment must fix area in floor that wood is exposed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
